description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Dimensions: 12 cm x 26 cm Made of textured fabric with a fabric lining A flap to hold the clutch together with magnetic button closure Crystal embellishment on the front of the flap One main compartment with an insert pocket Detachable chain strap for ease of carrying Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
